title: Social Commerce Intelligence
subtitle: Connect TikTok Shop, Instagram Shopping, or Pinterest to track conversion rates, demand signals, and which products are going viral — before they sell out.
tipLabel: 💡 Not sure where to find your access token? Ask AskBiz:
tipPrompt: How do I get my TikTok Shop access token to connect to AskBiz?
tiktokDesc: Orders, analytics, video performance, conversion rates
instagramDesc: Post insights, saves, product clicks, shopping orders
pinterestDesc: Pin analytics, saves (demand signals), product catalog
demandBody: {productName} has {saves} saves on {platform} but no orders yet — strong purchase intent. Check your stock level and make sure it’s easy to buy.
demandAskLink: Ask AskBiz how to convert saves into sales →
demandAskPrompt: I have {saves} saves on {platform} for “{productName}” but no orders. What should I do to convert these into sales?
analysePlatformPrompt: Analyse my {platform} performance. I have {views} views, {saves} saves, {orders} orders, and {revenue} revenue in the last 30 days. What should I do to improve my conversion rate of {rate}%?
noContentYet: No content data yet. Sync your platforms to see post performance.
analyseContentPrompt: Tell me more about this {platform} {contentType} for “{productName}”. It has {views} views, {saves} saves, and {orders} orders. How can I replicate this success?
noSignalsSub: All products with high saves are converting to orders.
convertSalesBtn: How to convert saves to sales →
convertSalesPrompt: “{productName}” has {saves} saves on {platform} but 0 orders. What are the most likely reasons and what should I do immediately to convert these saves into sales?
checkStockPrompt: Check my stock level for “{productName}” — I’m getting {saves} saves on {platform} and expect demand to spike. Do I have enough stock?
